zh.author: Your Name
zh.title: Your Blog
zh.description: 记录技术、工具、项目和长期思考的双语个人博客。
zh.intro: 这里记录我在技术、AI 工具、产品构思和个人项目中的实践。
about: 这里是我的个人博客，用来记录技术实践、AI Coding、文档驱动开发、工具工作流、项目复盘，以及一些关于效率、设计和长期学习的思考。

en.author: Your Name
en.title: Your Blog
en.description: A bilingual personal blog for engineering notes, projects, tools, and durable ideas.
en.intro: This site collects my notes on engineering, AI tools, product ideas, and personal projects.
about: This is my personal blog for technical practice, AI coding, document-driven development, tool workflows, project retrospectives, and longer thoughts about productivity, design, and learning.
